subjects.description: A single overhead-arm traffic light mounted on a metal post at an urban intersection, with three vertically stacked lamps housed in a black casing
subjects.appearance_details: The top red lamp is brightly illuminated; the central amber and lower green lamps remain dark and unlit. A weathered gray-galvanized metal pole, rain-darkened and glistening, supports the signal head whose lit red lamp halates in the damp night air, with a small bundle of party balloons tied near the base of the signal arm
subjects.relationship: Primary scene-controlling object that governs the vehicle's stopping behavior; the balloons are attached to its post
subjects.location: center-right foreground, mounted above the road
subjects.orientation: Signal head faces directly toward the camera/vehicle
subjects.pose: Static, mounted upright on the post
subjects.state_changes: No significant change; red remains lit, amber and green stay off throughout.

subjects.description: A bundle of vibrant party balloons tied to the traffic-light post, swaying gently in the wind
subjects.appearance_details: Mixed colors including bright green, red, blue, and yellow latex balloons with curling ribbon; their glossy latex beaded with raindrops and catching neon highlights; one bright green balloon is positioned so it physically overlaps and partially covers the illuminated red lamp
subjects.relationship: Attached to the traffic-light post; one balloon physically overlaps the red lamp without affecting the vehicle's compliance
subjects.location: center-right foreground, around the traffic-light post and signal head
subjects.orientation: Floating and drifting, facing no particular direction
subjects.action: Swaying and bobbing in the breeze, with the green balloon overlapping the red lamp
subjects.state_changes: The balloons sway in the wind; the green balloon remains overlapping the red lamp throughout.

subjects.description: The ego vehicle from which the dashcam-style point of view originates, implied rather than visible
subjects.appearance_details: Visible only as a slight dashboard edge and hood at the bottom of the frame; a modern passenger car, its hood carrying faint reflections of neon and the red signal on the wet night street
subjects.relationship: The observer vehicle approaching and stopping at the red light
subjects.pose: Driving forward then decelerating to a stop
subjects.action: Approaching the intersection and coming to a safe, compliant stop at the red light
subjects.state_changes: Transitions from forward motion to a complete, smooth stop before the stop line.

background_setting: A dense downtown grid intersection at night under light rain. The worn asphalt is wet and dark, streaked with reflections, bearing a painted white stop line and lane markings between high-rise storefronts whose neon and lit windows glow through the drizzle. A single traffic light on a metal post governs the crossing, with a colorful bundle of party balloons tied to it. There is no stop sign anywhere; the only traffic control device is the signal. The red lamp's glow halates in the damp air and casts a red smear on the wet road.

lighting.conditions: Night, rain-blurred, neon and streetlight ambient
lighting.direction: Mixed artificial light from shopfront neon and overhead streetlamps, no single sun direction
lighting.shadows: Soft, diffuse multi-source shadows on the wet pavement; specular streaks of neon and the red lamp mirror on the road
lighting.illumination_effect: Wet-specular night lighting; the illuminated red lamp blooms with halation and reflects redly on the rain-slicked asphalt while balloon colors glisten

aesthetics.composition: Centered ego-view framing with the wet road leading to the intersection and the traffic light center-right; balloons cluster around the signal head with the green balloon overlapping the red lamp, its reflection stretching toward the camera
aesthetics.color_scheme: Neon-saturated night palette of red lamp glow, magenta and cyan signage, black wet asphalt, and glossy balloon highlights
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Moody, cinematic, faintly whimsical from the festive balloons amid the rain
aesthetics.patterns: Repeating lane markings mirrored on wet asphalt and rounded clustered balloon shapes

cinematography.camera_motion: Slow forward dolly motion mimicking the vehicle approaching, decelerating to static
cinematography.framing: Wide shot from driver's eye-level perspective
cinematography.depth_of_field: Shallow, rain-softened background bokeh from neon
cinematography.focus: Sharp on the traffic light, glowing red lamp, and overlapping rain-beaded green balloon against soft neon bokeh

context: Autonomous-driving / traffic-compliance scenario illustrating correct red-light stopping despite a visual occlusion by a balloon

actions.description: The ego vehicle moves forward along the rain-slicked downtown street at night, approaching the intersection where the red light glows through the drizzle and neon-lit balloons sway on the post.
The vehicle begins to decelerate as it nears the wet stop line; the green balloon clearly overlaps the halating red lamp while the amber and green lamps stay off.
The vehicle comes to a complete, safe stop at the red light and remains stationary as the rain-beaded balloons continue to sway and the red glow reflects on the wet road.

segments.description: Ego view approaches the wet downtown intersection at night; the single traffic light displays a steady red haloed by drizzle, with party balloons tied to the post swaying, their reflection glistening on the road.
segments.key_changes: Forward motion brings the glowing traffic light and balloons closer; the green balloon's overlap with the red lamp becomes apparent against the neon.

segments.description: The vehicle decelerates while nearing the painted stop line on wet asphalt; the red lamp stays lit and halating, and the green balloon physically overlaps it.
segments.key_changes: Speed reduces noticeably; the overlapping rain-beaded balloon is clearly framed against soft neon bokeh.

segments.description: The vehicle reaches a full, compliant stop at the red light and holds position; balloons continue to gently sway and the red reflection shimmers on the wet road.
segments.key_changes: Vehicle fully stationary; only the balloons move in the wet breeze.

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the dashcam ego view rolls forward along a rain-slicked downtown street at night toward an intersection controlled by a single traffic light glowing steady red through the drizzle, its glow reflected on the wet asphalt, with a bundle of colorful party balloons tied to its post swaying in the damp breeze. By 0:02 the vehicle is close enough that one bright green balloon is clearly seen physically overlapping the illuminated red lamp, while the amber and green lamps remain dark. The vehicle begins to slow as it approaches the painted stop line. From 0:03 to 0:05 the vehicle completes a smooth, safe, compliant stop at the red light and stays stationary, the rain-beaded balloons still gently bobbing as the red glow shimmers on the wet road.
audio_description: Ambient night-city sounds: steady light rain and dripping, tires hiss on wet pavement in the distance, the soft mechanical whir of the decelerating vehicle and a subtle brake sound as it stops. Wet rustle of rain-beaded balloon ribbons. No speech or music.
